name: Echo River Crossing
descriptionSeed: The old stone-and-cable bridge where the Echo River narrows between granite shoulders. Upstream the water sheets gray-green over the rocks — the contamination is unmistakable here, worse every week. Fisher shacks stand empty. The bridge is the only crossing for miles, so everyone passes through: Harmonic traders, Radiant surveyors, valley farmers, and lately, strangers no one recognizes.
encounterFlavor: Travelers with rumors, contamination survey teams from both Heights and Plateau blaming each other, desperate fishers, and things washed downstream that shouldn't exist.
